name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotHelper.Looseness4Stagger
summary: How loose the upperBody of the character is made by a newBullet if staggerFall is running (and not falling).  Note atm the neck ramp values are ignored in staggerFall.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
